title: Hiring Store Manager at La Opala

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at La Opala
jsonLd.description:
La Opala is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About La Opala:
La Opala is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
